exclusionRules: system-level contamination at the pre-run gate
harness crash before the pair runner writes a closed run pack
shared Windows verification-path failures that affect both lanes before clean closure
missing raw trace files required by results:e4
primaryEndpoint: factoryQualityOverall by lane across eligible clean pairs

decisionRules.promptLanguageBetter: prompt-language wins only when the paired runs are trace-complete, claim-eligible, and show stronger factoryQualityOverall without a shared confound
decisionRules.codexAloneBetter: codex-alone wins only when the paired runs are trace-complete, claim-eligible, and show stronger factoryQualityOverall without a shared confound
decisionRules.inconclusive: use when shared confounds, missing counterbalance, or missing claim eligibility prevent a comparative claim
